creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Christos Margiolis from comment #16)

Hi,

about that 'dev.hdac.0.pindump' ... I am not able to switch it into '1'.

# sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1
dev.hdac.0.pindump: 0 -> 0

I even added it to loader.conf(8) but still the same:

# grep hdac /boot/loader.conf
  dev.hdac.0.pindump=1

I attach new dmesg(8) output after executing 'sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1' command tho.

Regards,
ver
